dashboard.label: Alert Triage Queue
dashboard.description: Human-in-the-loop SOC queue. Review triggered alerts and explicitly identify the impacted entities before assigning them to the AI Agent for full graph investigation.

search.query: index=* evidence=* severity=* source_alert=* | eval Time=strftime(_time, "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S") | eval Impacted_Entity=coalesce(user, host, src_ip, "Unknown") | stats count as Events max(Time) as Time by source_alert, Impacted_Entity, evidence, severity | rename source_alert as "Alert Name", evidence as "Evidence Type", severity as "Severity" | table Time "Alert Name" Impacted_Entity "Evidence Type" Events Severity | sort - Time
